name: Feed the Swarm
text:
When researching a technology you may treat this card as a planet with a green technology specialty symbol.

You may produce 1 additional infantry for their cost. These infantry do not count against your PRODUCTION limit.

name: PSM Breakthrough
text: Each system or planet can contain a number of structures equal to +1 the number of structures that game effects or abilities would allow. You may exhaust this card at the start of your turn during the action phase; remove up to 2 of your structures from the game board and place them in a system you control.
